subject: Re:
body:
of course

----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, February 6, 2007 10:10:34 AM
Subject: 

Dearest JE,

Would you please give a verbal reference for me? 

 

Since the letter of recommendation has no seal or real letter head it is not accepted. Very sorry.


I have been given an offer by Injazat Capital, and there are 2 other firms I'm interested in: Duke Equity and Daman Asset Mgt.

 

I'm sorry I have to ask you for this favor when I know your busy life.

 

Always,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
